title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Croma - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Croma - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Croma. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Croma:
Croma is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma!
